title: TEC Prediction with GNSS–Aditya-L1 & LSTM
desc: LSTM-based TEC forecasting using GNSS and solar data.
details: Developed a full pipeline including STEC to VTEC conversion, feature engineering, and LSTM modeling.

title: Extended Kalman Filter for GPS Positioning
details: Implemented EKF with state modeling, noise handling, and optimization techniques.
